chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.97 of 2023 Mrs. Kaveeta Versus Habib Bank Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 09.02.2024 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that he has been instructed not to press this appeal. As requested, appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
